overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through a neon-lit urban street at night. The scene is dominated by a large animated billboard for 'Budget Arms' displaying glitching text about the 2nd Amendment, surrounded by futuristic architecture and scattered traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk commercial corridor with overhead transit structure

events.description: billboard text begins glitching animation cycle, text fragments appearing and disappearing
distant vehicles become visible on the road ahead in the center distance

agents.ego_description: driving forward through the neon-lit street toward the Budget Arms billboard

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying animated advertisement for Budget Arms with figure holding gun and glitching text
dark industrial building facade with circular window patterns and blue neon signage
tall building with vertical advertisement banners and illuminated windows
elevated train track or walkway structure spanning above the street with support beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view driving through a covered cyberpunk street at night. The Budget Arms billboard dominates the center view with its glitching animation, while industrial buildings line the left and commercial towers rise on the right. An overhead transit structure spans the road ahead, and the scene is lit by neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching vehicle traffic under covered urban corridor

events.description: maintaining steady speed while closing distance to vehicles ahead
billboard text completes several glitch cycles, alternating between full message and fragmented state

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward, approaching the vehicles ahead on the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: vehicle driving in same direction ahead, gradually becoming more visible as distance closes

entered.detail: cars visible on the road ahead with taillights glowing in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving forward under the covered corridor, with the Budget Arms billboard growing larger in the frame. Vehicles ahead become visible in the distance, and the right commercial building approaches closer. The overhead transit structure passes out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street section approaching intersection with visible traffic congestion

events.description: slight brightening as the vehicle exits the most covered section of the corridor
nearing the vehicles ahead, traffic becoming more prominent in the immediate view

agents.ego_description: driving closer to the billboard and navigating toward the vehicles ahead at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: multiple vehicles visible ahead, moving slowly or stopped at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement display pillar on the right sidewalk showing fashion ads

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the end of the covered corridor section, with the Budget Arms billboard now shifting to the left side of the frame. The traffic ahead becomes clearly visible as distinct vehicles in the center distance. The left industrial building passes out of view while new advertisement pillars appear on the right sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a neon-lit cyberpunk corridor that gradually opens up toward a congested urban thoroughfare. It begins beneath a covered street where a massive, glitching Budget Arms billboard dominates the center view, flanked by industrial buildings and towering commercial architecture. As the vehicle advances, the billboard grows larger in the frame and the overhead transit structure recedes behind the camera, bringing the distant traffic and the right-side buildings into sharper focus. The scene then shifts as the vehicle nears the end of the covered section, causing the billboard to slide toward the left of the frame while the industrial walls give way to advertisement pillars on the right sidewalk. Finally, the view expands to reveal a clear line of distinct vehicles waiting in the center distance under the glow of the city's advertisements.
